goal: Persist the frontend v6 route contract fields through project save/reload and dataset route snapshots so the real app preserves the canonical mockup route contract state.
head: c5de8d2
blocked_scope: Changing release readiness, M6 review docs, model catalog pins, training evidence policy, or CUDA/MLX training acceptance
Downloading or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Reworking unrelated frontend pages or backend milestones outside v6 route contract persistence
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may only persist v6 route contract fields across project API/DB/frontend save-reload and dataset route snapshots, update focused tests/generated DTO/OpenAPI, LLM handoff docs, completion log, and PABCD contract.
required_commands: rg -n -- "task_type|requires_calculation|requires_human_review|is_default|examples_json|examples" services/api/app/schemas/project.py services/api/app/services/project_service.py services/shared/db/models/project.py services/shared/db/repositories/dataset_store.py tests/api/test_projects.py tests/dataset/test_dataset_builder.py apps/desktop/src/lib/appModel.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/appModel.test.mjs apps/desktop/e2e/mockApi.mjs apps/desktop/e2e/fe_v6_route_contract.test.mjs schemas/openapi.json apps/desktop/src/lib/generated.ts docs/CONTEXT.md docs/WORKING.md .codex/tasks/current.json
required_evidence: Project API accepts and returns v6 route contract fields: task_type, requires_calculation, requires_human_review, is_default, and examples.
Desktop routesToProjectInput/routesFromProject round-trip those fields without degrading to inferred defaults.
Dataset route_snapshot preserves the v6 route contract fields for downstream dataset/teacher/training traceability.
OpenAPI seed and generated desktop DTOs match the backend schema.
Docs continue to state that v0/M6 release remains NOT_GO until real trained adapter no-fake endpoint evidence exists.
executed_verification_commands: rg -n -- "task_type|requires_calculation|requires_human_review|is_default|examples_json|examples" services/api/app/schemas/project.py services/api/app/services/project_service.py services/shared/db/models/project.py services/shared/db/repositories/dataset_store.py tests/api/test_projects.py tests/dataset/test_dataset_builder.py apps/desktop/src/lib/appModel.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/appModel.test.mjs apps/desktop/e2e/mockApi.mjs apps/desktop/e2e/fe_v6_route_contract.test.mjs schemas/openapi.json apps/desktop/src/lib/generated.ts docs/CONTEXT.md docs/WORKING.md .codex/tasks/current.json
warnings: This gate does not produce real trained adapter evidence or run CUDA training.
M6-RC and v0 release remain NOT_GO.

phase_notes.plan: Use the canonical v6 route contract mockup as the frontend target and preserve edited route contract fields through project API/DB/frontend save-reload plus dataset snapshots.
phase_notes.audit: The current desktop v6 builder edits route task/default/review/example fields, but project persistence only stores route_id, description, and is_unsafe, so reloading a saved project can lose contract state.
phase_notes.build: Extend project route schema/model/service, desktop app model/mock API, generated DTO/OpenAPI, and focused tests to round-trip the v6 fields.
phase_notes.check: Run focused API/dataset tests, desktop model and v6 e2e tests, OpenAPI drift check, evidence search, bootstrap m1-smoke, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this route contract persistence phase.

pabcd.approved_scope: Persist v6 route contract fields through project API/DB/frontend save-reload and dataset route snapshots; update focused tests/generated DTO/OpenAPI/docs/PABCD only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No release GO claim, no M6 review GO edits, no model/catalog/training evidence policy changes, no downloaded weights/adapters/images/evidence bundles, no unrelated milestone rework.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
